name: Wispr Flow
description: Wispr Flow — AI voice dictation app for macOS that transcribes speech to text in any application with context awareness.

seo.title: Wispr Flow — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Wispr Flow: Wispr Flow — AI voice dictation app for macOS that transcribes speech to text in any application with context awareness.

when_to_use: Dictating text in any app with AI-corrected voice input
Speeding up written communication with hands-free voice typing
Using voice-to-text with real-time AI transcription accuracy
Reducing typing fatigue for developers with voice-based input

pros: Works across any app via accessibility
review.verdict: The best dictation tool on macOS today — worth it if you type a lot and live on Apple hardware.
review.best_for: Mac power users and writers who want to dictate into any app quickly
review.not_for: Windows or Linux users and anyone with strict local-only transcription requirements
